title: Indulgent Vietnamese Sea Bass Fillets Stone-Bowl-Dolsot
description: A salty, crisp, and satisfying Vietnamese date-night dish featuring halal-friendly sea bass fillets and stone-bowl-dolsot. Perfect for a romantic evening at home.
instructions: Season the sea bass fillets with salt and set aside.
Heat the unsalted butter in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Sear the sea bass fillets for 2-3 minutes on each side, or until golden brown.
Transfer the skillet to the preheated oven and bake for 8-10 minutes, or until cooked through.
Meanwhile, prepare the stone-bowl-dolsot by stirring in the veggie dolsot rice with a fork, then adding the soy sauce, fish sauce, and dark soy sauce.
Add the thinly sliced shallots and minced garlic to the skillet and saute for 1-2 minutes, or until fragrant.
Stir in the chopped lemongrass and cook for an additional 1 minute.
To assemble the dish, place a cooked sea bass fillet on top of the rice in the stone bowl.
Garnish with chopped cilantro and serve immediately.
